# Marc‑Aurele Besner

> Senior Web3/AI Engineer. Smart contracts, AI agents, decentralized infrastructure, and developer tools. Available for advisory.

## About

Marc‑Aurele Besner is a Senior Web3/AI Engineer based in Canada with 5+ years of experience shipping Web3 products, smart contracts, SDKs, block explorers, and AI agents. He has led engineering at Autonomys Network, Oamo, and Gluwa, and advises early-stage teams on product, engineering, and smart-contract architecture.

## Specialties

- Smart contracts (Solidity, EVM, security, gas optimization, upgrade patterns)
- AI agents and AI-assisted developer tooling
- Decentralized infrastructure (IPLD, Substrate, Polkadot.js, Ceramic, Lit Protocol)
- SDK and developer-tooling design
- TypeScript / Next.js / React application development

## Key pages

- [Home](https://marcaurelebesner.com/): overview and recent work
- [Projects](https://marcaurelebesner.com/projects): full list of Web3, AI, and tooling projects
- [Experience](https://marcaurelebesner.com/experience): career timeline with detailed role descriptions
- [Advisory](https://marcaurelebesner.com/advisory): services, engagement models, and FAQs
- [Contact](https://marcaurelebesner.com/contact): form, response time, and FAQs

## Featured projects

- [VibeInProd](https://vibeinprod.com): AI codebase stabilization for startups
- [OpenDrift](https://opendrift.app): AI tool surfacing the full distribution of LLM responses
- [PayXor](https://payxor.xyz): Multi-chain stablecoin payment infrastructure
- [Astral Block Explorer](https://github.com/autonomys/astral): Production block explorer for Autonomys
- [Autonomys Auto-SDK](https://github.com/autonomys/auto-sdk): TypeScript SDK for the Autonomys Network
